SEARCH
Package discount

Class CategoryDiscountFactory

java.lang.Object
discount.CategoryDiscountFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
DiscountFactory
public class CategoryDiscountFactory extends Object implements DiscountFactory
It implements the factory for those with category coverage
Version:
1.0
Author:
Ana O.R.
See Also:

  • StoreProduct
